howItWorks.intro: This room ac btu calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: BTU
rules.explanation: Base calculation with sun and occupancy adjustments.

howItWorks.outro: Energy costs and incentives change by region and season. Check with your local utility for current rates.

faq.q: How many BTU per square foot?
faq.a: About 20 BTU per sq ft as a baseline, adjusted for sun, occupants, and insulation.

faq.q: What is a ton of cooling?
faq.a: 12,000 BTU/hour. A typical room AC is 0.5-1.5 tons.

howWeCalculate.intro: This room ac btu calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above

howWeCalculate.disclaimer: These calculations are estimates based on standard formulas. For critical decisions, always consult a qualified professional.
